Services
Tax-Efficient Strategies Minimize taxes with smart withdrawal sequencing. Portfolio Management Diversified portfolios aligned with your timeline. Retirement Money Map A clear plan for every dollar in retirement. Social Security Optimization Time your benefits to maximize lifetime income. Estate & Legacy Planning Protect your family and pass wealth efficiently.

📋 Implementation Status

15 lifestyle images identified from AE Google Drive folder. These professional photos will add warmth and human connection to the Capital Wealth brand.

Images Available

Ready to download from Google Drive

Directory Created

/assets/images/lifestyle/

Next Steps: Manual download of images from Google Drive folder required to complete integration.

Usage Notes

  • Primary blue for text, buttons, and dark sections
  • Orange as accent only — arrows, highlights, CTAs
  • Light grey #f0f1f3 for alternating section backgrounds
  • Always use horizontal logo in nav/footer; icon for favicon and social
  • Pantone reference: 7686 C (blue), 430 C (grey)
  • No emojis on the website — use SVG icons
  • Right-click any image to download

This page is unlisted and excluded from search engines.
